name: the-heart-vibe
description: Wewnętrzny marketplace pluginów Claude Code (CLI/IDE + Claude Desktop Cowork) dla The Heart Vibe. Aligned z firmowym procesem Venture Building (DD by Heart — 12 non-negotiable milestones w 4 fazach). Aktualnie 2 pluginy: heart-vb (47 skilli, kompletny VB toolkit) i pptx-generator (branded .pptx decks + design system export).

plugins.name: heart-vb
plugins.description: Venture Builder toolkit dla The Heart — 47 skilli w 9 kategoriach (council, self-improving, vb-research, vb-product, vb-finance, vb-commercial, vb-comms, vb-process, heart-custom). Master orchestrator /heart-vb-process pokrywa wszystkie 12 milestones DD by Heart (Discovery → Creation → Validation → Fundraising). Jeden install, kompletne pokrycie od kickoffu do fundraisingu. Auto-loaded hooks działają w Claude Code CLI/IDE i Claude Desktop Cowork.

plugins.name: pptx-generator
plugins.description: Two-mode plugin: (1) generate branded .pptx decks z The Heart design system, (2) export design system jako Claude-Design-importable React + Tailwind repo. 2 skille: presentation-generator (deck creation z brand templates) i theheart-frontend (on-brand UI generation). Komplementarny dla M11 materiałów fundraisingowych z heart-vb.
